title: Integrate Memory pull/capture decisions

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1579 by adding a command-backed Memory pull/capture decision packet to startup, implement, and closeout/report surfaces.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Preserve agent-owned judgment; do not add keyword-triggered policy; keep Memory as anti-rediscovery knowledge, not task state, backlog, or docs mirror.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact packet derivation, first-slice scope, tests, docs, and command wiring that satisfy the accepted #1579 shaping.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement the first useful #1579 slice: packet contract/projection, structured Memory route input, capture/routing status tests, and guidance updates.
proof_expectations: Focused Memory route/capture tests for structured context and owner routing.
make test-workspace and make lint-workspace before PR.
completion_criteria: start emits memory_decision_packet for durable-knowledge pressure with a concrete memory route command.
implement emits memory_decision_packet for changed-path or active-state durable/capture pressure.
closeout/report exposes unresolved Memory decision state before completion claims.
Memory route/capture surfaces distinguish checked_none, capture_candidate, routed_elsewhere, dismissed, and not_checked without keyword authority.

execution_run.what happened: Implemented #1579 Memory pull/capture decision packet across startup, implement, and closeout/report surfaces; added structured Memory route/capture inputs, root capture-note stage/task support, closeout decision-state semantics, dogfooding evidence, and guardrail tests.
execution_run.scope touched: Workspace runtime/reporting, Memory routing/capture, contracts/generated command packages, docs, tests, Memory guidance.

finished_run_review.scope respected: Scope stayed within #1579. The packet is command-backed, selector-first, and preserves agent-owned judgment. Task prose is carried as context and is not routing authority; closeout force now derives from durable-residue pressure rather than the closeout surface itself. The root capture command now accepts the stage/task context that packets recommend.
